name: Daily Sanitation Log
source: Question list combined from completed HeavyConnect PDFs download30.pdf and download31.pdf to cover field/harvest and warehouse variants.

questions.label: Have all surfaces been cleaned and sanitized?
Have the walls, shelves and storage areas been cleaned and sanitized?
Have the sinks been cleaned and sanitized?
Have the floors been swept and if needed properly mopped?
Has all trash and litter been removed?
Are all trash cans properly lined and covered?
Were all harvest tools (clippers, loppers) collected at the end of shift for cleaning and sanitation?
Are all collected tools free from visible signs of damage, rust and chips?
Were all hand tools cleaned and sanitized following the proper procedure?
Do all doors and latches work properly?
Have the Piano Key (sizer/sorter) 1 & 2 been cleaned and sanitized?
Have the Wash Tank 1 & 2 been cleaned and sanitized?
Employee name of who reported these checks?
